title: Visible Diamonds
description: Makes the Diamond and Deepslate Ore Blocks Visible
body:
**Visible Ores** is a resource pack made to make diamonds easier to find and collect. For both the diamond ore and deepslate diamond ore blocks, this resource pack makes them have a light blue texture with a dark blue outline. This resource pack is for 1.17+.



**I hope you enjoy this resource pack and free free to leave any suggestions in the comments!**
